description_long: This handgun features a large, rectangular upper slide with a matte black finish and subtle surface wear, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The grip is ergonomically contoured, made from a dark, textured material that appears to provide a secure hold, and is visually distinct from the rest of the body. The trigger guard is broad and angular, seamlessly integrated into the lower frame, and the trigger itself is partially visible. The barrel is square-profiled, with a prominent muzzle opening and radial markings or grooves around the front face, suggesting a reinforced or stylized design. The magazine base is flush with the grip, lacking any visible extensions or embellishments. Overall, the handgun has a modern, industrial look with minimal decorative markings.
description: A modern, rectangular black handgun with a textured ergonomic grip and a broad, angular trigger guard. The barrel features a square profile with radial front markings, and the magazine base is flush with the grip.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the rectangular slide, textured grip, and broad trigger guard, with the magazine base flush to the grip.
description_view_1: The front view shows the square barrel muzzle with radial markings and the symmetrical, blocky profile of the slide.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the grip's ergonomic contour and the angular trigger guard.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the grip and the slide, with the square barrel opening and radial markings visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and finger grooves, constructed from a dark, rubberized material that appears textured for enhanced grip. The surface features a stippled or pebbled pattern, providing a non-slip hold, and the overall shape is slightly curved to fit the hand comfortably. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is broad, angular, and robust, with a squared-off lower edge and a thick profile. It is integrated smoothly into the lower frame, lacking undercuts or additional accessories, and has a utilitarian, reinforced appearance without visible texturing or decorative features.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is square-profiled and relatively short, with a prominent, flat muzzle face. The front of the barrel features radial grooves or markings, possibly for reinforcement or as a stylized design element. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The surface is plain, with only subtle wear and minor surface imperfections, giving it a utilitarian look.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests. It is simple in design, with no visible logos, texturing, or embellishments, maintaining a streamlined profile.
